topStories.description: Trump's envoys have sent a 15-point ceasefire plan to Iran via Pakistan. But Tehran has its own conditions.

dailyNews.title: Middle East war: Oil crisis from US-Iran war could boost China’s EV makers as fuel prices surge, says report
dailyNews.description: Middle East war: Beijing's shift to renewable energy and electric vehicles has reduced its oil consumption by at least 10%. The ongoing Middle East conflict may further benefit China's EV industry, as higher oil prices drive global expansion, particularly in Asia.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s war briefings feature daily video clips of US military strikes on Iran: Report
dailyNews.description: Each montage typically runs for about two minutes, though some have been longer, according to the report.

dailyNews.title: Harbinger’s next product will be hybrid emergency vehicles
dailyNews.description: The young California startup is already building RVs, FedEx vans, and box trucks. Now its hybrid powertrain will underpin ambulances and mobile healthcare units.

dailyNews.title: Silver prices surge by 6 per cent after 10 days of slump. Check rates here
dailyNews.description: Analysts attributed the rebound of Silver prices to strong positive sentiment in global precious metals markets and a weaker US dollar.

dailyNews.title: ‘Shameful, insensitive’: Supreme Court raps Haryana Police over probe into 3-year-old's rape in Gurgaon, SIT formed
dailyNews.description: The top court issued show cause notices to officials of Gurugram Police and asked them why action should not be taken against them for shoddy investigation in the case

dailyNews.title: ‘US lost initiative weeks ago’: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger says Iran now holds upper hand in West Asia war
dailyNews.description: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger asserts Iran has gained the upper hand in its conflict with the US, aided by strategic decisions and a perceived civilizational war. The potential for US-Iran negotiations exists, with Pakistan offering to mediate talks.

dailyNews.title: Spain’s PM says Israel to inflict on Lebanon same destruction as in Gaza
dailyNews.description: Pedro ​Sanchez has been one of the few leaders in Europe to condemn Israel's war in Lebanon, US-Israeli ⁠war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Jack Keane warns ceasefire with Iran would 'play right into their hands' as Trump signals deal progress
dailyNews.description: Ret. Gen. Jack Keane warns against an Iran ceasefire, saying it plays into Tehran's hands and that sustained military pressure is the path to a deal.

dailyNews.title: Beloved student Jimmy Gracey’s standing room only memorials span campus church service, fraternity vigil
dailyNews.description: University of Alabama students packed a memorial mass for Jimmy Gracey as Barcelona police await autopsy results in his likely accidental death case.

dailyNews.title: SEE IT: Travelers sound off as ICE agents deployed to airports as shutdown drags past 40 days
dailyNews.description: Travelers are divided over Trump's plan to deploy ICE agents to airports as the DHS shutdown leaves TSA workers unpaid and increasingly short-staffed.

dailyNews.title: STEVE FORBES: Drive out wealth, then beg — Hochul’s New York in a nutshell
dailyNews.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul's appeal to wealthy taxpayers highlights the state's stark contrast with Florida, which has no income tax and faster economic growth.

dailyNews.title: American Dennis Coyle lands in Texas after over a year in Taliban captivity
dailyNews.description: Dennis Coyle, a 64-year-old American man held by the Taliban in Afghanistan for more than a year without charges, landed on U.S. soil on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Houston Rodeo ride malfunction leaves people dangling in air for several minutes
dailyNews.description: A video captured people dangling in the air for several minutes during a recent amusement ride malfunction at the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie says family in 'agony' in first interview since mother Nancy's disappearance
dailyNews.description: "Today" anchor Savannah Guthrie said her family is in "agony" while sitting down with Hoda Kotb for her first interview since her mother was reported missing last month.

dailyNews.title: Chuck Norris’ final co-star Vanilla Ice says ‘America’s bada--’ wasn’t just 'Hollywood fluff’
dailyNews.description: Vanilla Ice mourns Chuck Norris, who died at 86, calling him a true American hero and reflecting on their final film together, "Zombie Plane," which is slated for release in 2027.

dailyNews.title: Some CNN staffers skeptical of network's 'experiment' giving Anderson Cooper, Jake Tapper a podcast makeover
dailyNews.description: CNN raised eyebrows this month when it implemented an on-air "experiment" that gave podcast vibes to programs hosted by Anderson Cooper and Jake Tapper.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Emily Gregory Wins Florida Special Election in Mar-a-Lago’s District
dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s victory in Palm Beach brought the Democratic surge to President Trump’s backyard, while a union leader leads in a race for a state senate seat vacated by Florida’s lieutenant governor.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
dailyNews.description: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.

dailyNews.title: As Trump declares war won, Iran mocks suggestion serious talks underway
dailyNews.description: Trump says the Iran war is already won, but more U.S. forces are heading to the Mideast as Tehran asks U.S. officials if they're "negotiating with yourselves?"

dailyNews.title: Latest news on Iran war as regime's military mocks Trump negotiations claim
dailyNews.description: President Trump insists negotiations with Iran are underway but parts of the regime appear to be contradicting his claims. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Holly Williams report.

dailyNews.title: Additional Troops Deployed to Middle East as Trump Claims Victory
dailyNews.description: More than 1,000 additional troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are heading to the Middle East, according to two sources. The announcement came as President Donald Trump in the Oval Office Tuesday said, “We’ve won this, this war has been won.” NBC's Richard Engel reports for TODAY on the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin sworn in to serve as Homeland Security Secretary
dailyNews.description: President Trump held a swearing-in ceremony for the Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin at the White House. Mullin pledged to "fight every single day" to protect the homeland and commented on the ongoing partial government shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Justice Department steps up probe into Trump target John Brennan
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department has requested House Intelligence Committee records related to former CIA Director John Brennan, a frequent target of President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the request

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie opens up on mother's disappearance and inside Trump's daily video briefing on Iran war: Morning Rundown
dailyNews.description: In today’s newsletter: Trump’s daily Iran video briefing fuels concerns he’s not getting a full picture on the war.

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump's daily video montage briefing about the Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Each day since the start of the war in Iran, U.S. military officials compile a video update for President Donald Trump that shows video of the biggest, most successful strikes on Iranian targets over the previous 48 hours, three current U.S. officials and a former U.S. official said

dailyNews.title: 'Oh, golly': Britain's embattled Starmer navigates Trump's Iran war ire
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer likely won't fire back insults at President Donald Trump, those close to him say.
